backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Refactor login endpoint to use POST method with a request body DTO instead of GET with query parameters.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.before:
@GetMapping("/auth/user")
public AuthDto loginUserAuth(@RequestParam String username, @RequestParam String password)

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Add new endpoint for demo admin login with environment profile checks.
Replace specific SignatureException catch block with broader SecurityException to handle JWT signature validation errors.
Replace Boolean wrapper with primitive boolean for the active field to enforce non-null semantics.
Ensure confirmationToken is generated immediately upon user instantiation.
Add an 'active' field to AuthUser to support dynamic account status instead of hardcoding it.
Add a public no-argument constructor to the DTO class to ensure compatibility with frameworks that require default constructors for deserialization or instantiation.
Add import for Activity domain class to support new permission logic.
Add import for ActivityRepository to support new permission logic.
Add import for Institution domain class to support new permission logic.
Add import for InstitutionRepository to support new permission logic.
Add import for Member domain class to support new permission logic.
Remove unused UserRepository import as it is no longer used in the class.
Replace UserRepository dependency with InstitutionRepository to support institution-based permission checks.
Add ActivityRepository dependency to support activity-based permission checks.
Remove unused userId variable extraction from authentication principal.
Add new permission case ACTIVITY.MEMBER to check if user belongs to the same institution as the activity.
Update Swagger UI resource handler paths to point to the new version 5.10.3 instead of 4.10.3.
Change the resource handler path for images to documents/declarations.
